channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: Social media bans and digital curfews to be trialled on UK teenagers
item.description: Article URL: https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cn89g3ngkyzo Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47513280 Points: 4 # Comments: 0

item.title: Meta ordered to pay $375M in New Mexico trial over child exploitation

item.title: Show HN: DuckDB community extension for prefiltered HNSW using ACORN-1
item.description: Hey folks! As someone doing hybrid search daily and wishing I could have a pgvector-like experience but with actual prefiltered approximate nearest neighbours, I decided to just take a punt on...

item.title: VitruvianOS – Desktop Linux Inspired by the BeOS
item.description: Article URL: https://v-os.dev Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47512816 Points: 37 # Comments: 12

item.title: The BB-777 is the ultimate in boombox nostalgia
item.description: Bumpboxx is fully embracing nostalgia with its latest boombox, the BB-777, which is modeled very closely on the legendary Sharp GF-777. A real deal GF-777 will set you back over $2,000 for one in...

item.title: With $3.5B in fresh capital, Kleiner Perkins is going all in on AI
item.description: The fundraise includes $1 billion for investing in early-stage startups, and $2.5 billion for late-stage growth businesses.

item.title: In Edison’s Revenge, Data Centers Are Transitioning From AC to DC
item.description: Article URL: https://spectrum.ieee.org/data-center-dc Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47511703 Points: 116 # Comments: 141

item.title: Zero-Cost POSIX Compliance: Encoding the Socket State Machine in Lean's Types
item.description: Article URL: https://ngrislain.github.io/blog/2026-3-25-zerocost-posix-compliance-encoding-the-socket-state-machine-in-lean-4s-type-system/ Comments URL:...

item.title: Flighty Airports
item.description: Article URL: https://flighty.com/airports Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47511589 Points: 206 # Comments: 67

item.title: OpenAI’s Sora was the creepiest app on your phone — now it’s shutting down
item.description: Though the underlying Sora 2 video- and audio-generation model is scarily impressive, there was not sustained interest in an AI-only social feed.

item.title: A Compiler Writing Journey
item.description: Article URL: https://github.com/DoctorWkt/acwj Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47511208 Points: 57 # Comments: 4

item.title: Instagram and Facebook are about to be filled with affiliate content
item.description: Instagram and Facebook content will soon have shopping links baked into posts, essentially cutting out third-party "link in bio"-style tools. Meta announced Tuesday that it's adding commerce...

item.title: Kentucky woman rejects $26M offer to turn her farm into a data center
item.description: A "major artificial intelligence company" reportedly offered a Kentucky family $26 million to build a data center on their farm.

item.title: Pentagon’s ‘Attempt to Cripple’ Anthropic Is Troubling, Judge Says
item.description: During a hearing Tuesday, a district court judge questioned the Department of Defense’s motivations for labeling the Claude AI developer a supply-chain risk.

item.title: Meta misled users about its products’ safety, jury decides
item.description: Meta willfully violated New Mexico law by misleading users about the safety of its products and engaging in an unconscionable trade practice, a jury found. The company will face a $375 million...

item.title: NASA wants to put a $20 billion base on the Moon
item.description: NASA Administrator Jared Isaacman has big plans for the future of the agency, including the construction of a $20 billion lunar base that he said will establish an "enduring presence" on the Moon....

item.title: I wanted to build vertical SaaS for pest control, so I took a technician job
item.description: Article URL: https://www.onhand.pro/p/i-wanted-to-build-vertical-saas-for-pest-control-i-took-a-technician-job-instead Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47509571 Points: 245 #...

item.title: What is ICE actually doing at the airport?
item.description: I arrived at John F. Kennedy International Airport nearly five hours before my domestic flight. This is not my way - usually I roll up to the airport 30 minutes before boarding - but not even I...

item.title: OpenAI just gave up on Sora and its billion-dollar Disney deal
item.description: On Tuesday afternoon, OpenAI announced "We're saying goodbye to Sora," the video generation tool that it launched at the end of 2024, and centered in a massive licensing deal with Disney only a...

item.title: Anthropic hands Claude Code more control, but keeps it on a leash
item.description: Anthropic’s new auto mode for Claude Code lets AI execute tasks with fewer approvals, reflecting a broader shift toward more autonomous tools that balance speed with safety through built-in...

item.title: Spotify tests new tool to stop AI slop from being attributed to real artists
item.description: The idea behind the new tool is to give artists more control over which tracks are associated with their name on Spotify.

item.title: Arm’s first CPU ever will plug into Meta’s AI data centers later this year
item.description: After decades of only licensing its chip designs for others to use, UK-based Arm revealed the first chip it's producing on its own, and the first customer. Dubbed the Arm AGI CPU, it's another...

item.title: Apple is testing a standalone app for its overhauled Siri
item.description: Apple's efforts to rebuild its Apple Intelligence AI platform will make its debut at its Worldwide Developers Conference on June 8th. A new version of Siri that transforms the voice assistant into...

item.title: Databricks bought two startups to underpin its new AI security product
item.description: With an overflowing war chest from its recent $5 billion raise, Databricks is buying startups and looking for more. It acquired Antimatter and SiftD.ai.

item.title: The man who coined Metaverse now says Meta’s glasses are creepy
item.description: Neal Stephenson didn't invent the virtual reality headset. But Meta certainly knows his name - in 1992, his seminal cyberpunk novel Snow Crash coined the phrase "Metaverse" to describe a virtual...

item.title: Arm is releasing the first in-house chip in its 35-year history
item.description: Arm is producing its own CPU for the first time. It developed the CPU with Meta, which is also the chip's first customer.

item.title: OpenAI’s plans to make ChatGPT more like Amazon aren’t going so well
item.description: OpenAI says it's moving away from Instant Checkout, which allowed users to buy items directly through the ChatGPT interface.

item.title: Apple launches iOS 26.4 with AI playlists, purchase sharing, and more
item.description: iOS 26.4 is here, and it comes with a bunch of small but notable updates. That includes a new Playlist Playground launching in beta in Apple Music, which uses AI to generate a song playlist -...

item.title: Google TV’s new Gemini features keep fans updated on sports teams and more
item.description: Three Gemini-powered features are coming to your Google TV. This includes visual responses, deep dives, and sports briefs.
